!=================== MODEL DATA FILE GENERATED BY RECURDYN SDK ====================
!
!====================================== Ground ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='the_ground'
PART / 2 , GROUND
, NAME = 'the_ground'
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='gnd'
MARKER / 1
, NAME = 'the_ground.gnd'
, PART = 2
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0D , 0D , 0D
 
 


!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J001_j'
MARKER / 58
, NAME = 'the_ground.J001_j'
, PART = 2
, QP = 93.16831574 , -249.31821077 , 26.85908127
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 2.53072741539178 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J002_j'
MARKER / 75
, NAME = 'the_ground.J002_j'
, PART = 2
, QP = 171.201966035601 , -249.31816307944 , -59.7778868123042
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 2.53072741539178 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J002_j_tmp'
MARKER / 82
, NAME = 'the_ground.J002_j_tmp'
, PART = 2
, QP = 171.201966035601 , -249.31816307944 , -59.7778868123042
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 2.53072741539178 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J003_j'
MARKER / 98
, NAME = 'the_ground.J003_j'
, PART = 2
, QP = 74.6691324853232 , -441.818163081737 , 13.4193458297788
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J004_gear'
MARKER / 109
, NAME = 'the_ground.J004_gear'
, PART = 2
, QP = 144.579524596209 , -249.31816307944 , -78.4191209937132
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , -2.18166156499291
 
 
!====================================== DummyBody@RecurDyn_Model========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='RecurDyn_SDK_MotherBody'


!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L001'
PART / 30
, NAME = 'L001'
, MASS = 8.4723155641
, CM = 34
, IP = 591683.02226 , 587872.6073 , 5614.22715
, 0 , 0 , 0
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L001_cm'
MARKER / 34
, NAME = 'L001.L001_cm'
, PART = 30
, QP = 80.03941129 , -241.83853907 , 19.22559305
, REULER = 2.64685000672053e-006 , 1.5707953497149 , 0.511617862763294
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L001_orig'
MARKER / 31
, NAME = 'L001.L001_orig'
, PART = 30
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J003_i'
MARKER / 97
, NAME = 'L001.J003_i'
, PART = 30
, QP = 74.6691324853232 , -441.818163081737 , 13.4193458297788
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L002'
PART / 12
, NAME = 'L002'
, MASS = 0.64237693268
, CM = 4
, IP = 852.085 , 852.085 , 121.89501
, 0 , 0 , 0
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L002_cm'
MARKER / 4
, NAME = 'L002.L002_cm'
, PART = 12
, QP = 124.44956529 , -249.31816308 , 11.78274012
, REULER = -1.5707963267949 , 0.57870963485539 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L002_orig'
MARKER / 13
, NAME = 'L002.L002_orig'
, PART = 12
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J002_i'
MARKER / 74
, NAME = 'L002.J002_i'
, PART = 12
, QP = 171.201966035601 , -249.31816307944 , -59.7778868123042
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 2.53072741539178 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L003'
PART / 42
, NAME = 'L003'
, MASS = 1.89891879063
, CM = 46
, IP = 3644.32413 , 2976.7648 , 1949.39272
, 0 , 0 , 0
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L003_cm'
MARKER / 46
, NAME = 'L003.L003_cm'
, PART = 42
, QP = 93.16831574 , -249.31821077 , 26.85908127
, REULER = -1.5707928236859 , 2.13377559321641 , 1.57079798042232
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='L003_orig'
MARKER / 43
, NAME = 'L003.L003_orig'
, PART = 42
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J001_i'
MARKER / 57
, NAME = 'L003.J001_i'
, PART = 42
, QP = 93.16831574 , -249.31821077 , 26.85908127
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 2.53072741539178 , -1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J001'
JOINT / 51
, NAME = 'J001'
, I = 57
, J = 58
, Fixed
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J002'
JOINT / 65
, NAME = 'J002'
, I = 74
, J = 75
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 1000000
, NAME = 'J002.RMotion'
, JOINT = 65
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = SHF(TIME,0.0,1.745329251994329,0.3490658503988657,15.70796326794896,0)\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J003'
JOINT / 88
, NAME = 'J003'
, I = 97
, J = 98
, Translational
 
 
!======================================== Gear ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='J004'
GEAR/108
, NAME = 'J004'
, JOINTS = 88, 65
, CV = 109


!======================================== UNIT ========================================
!
UNITS / 
, FORCE = Newton
, FORCE_SYMBOL = 'N'
, MASS = Kilogram
, MASS_SYMBOL = 'kg'
, LENGTH = Millimeter
, LENGTH_SYMBOL = 'mm'
, TIME = Second
, TIME_SYMBOL = 's'


accgrav /  IGRAV = 0
, JGRAV = 0
, KGRAV = -9806.65


OUTPUT/GRSAVE
,RPLTSAVE = TRUE
,RADSAVE = TRUE
,REQSAVE = FALSE
,OUTSAVE = FALSE
,MSGSAVE = TRUE
,RANSAVE = FALSE
, STEP_PLOT_FACTOR = 1
, MATCH_REPTIME = TRUE


!======================================= INTPAR =======================================
!
INTPAR / IMGALPHA
, KMAX = 2
, HMAX = 0.01
, INITIAL_H = 1e-006
, ERROR = 0.001
, SPARSE = FALSE
, NDAMPING = 1
, INTERPOLATE_H


!===================================== EQUILIBRIUM =====================================
!
EQUILIBRIUM /
, RPLT_INI = TRUE
, ERROR = 0.001
, MAXIT = 100
, INITIALSTEPSIZE = 1e-006
, STEPSIZEFACTOR = 2
, ANIMATIONFLAG = 0
, TYPE = 2


!===================================== KINEMATICS =====================================
!
KINEMATICS /
, ERROR = 0.001
, MAXIT = 50




!===================================== SOLVEROPTION ======================================
!
SOLVEROPTION /
, TOLERANCEIF  = 1e-008
, INITIALVELOCITY  = RELATIVE


!===================================== INFO ======================================
!
INFO /
, MODEL_NAME = 'RecurDyn_Model'
, CURRENT_SYSTEM_NAME = 'RecurDyn_Model'


END
END
